subject: Export star file of tilt series ctf
body:
Hi all,

I just started using Warp and I have to say it is great. 
I don't use Warp in the relion 3.1 subtomo workflow but for relion 4.0
I did 2D processing, tilt series alignment using autoalign, then back to 
Warp for tilt series CTF estimation.
I found the ctf from tilt series CTF estimation from Warp look great with 
the constraint estimation vs the one that I got from Ctffind4 due to the 
low signal from high tilt in my tilt series.
Is there any way to export the CTF estimation from Warp into a star file 
with CTF info from each view of the tomogram? I can convert it to ctffind4 
format to import into Relion 4 later.

Best,
Huy
